dafrjulia 0.1.1.9000

Open a Daf repository based on path

Source: R/complete.R
open_daf.Rd

Dispatches to the appropriate backend based on path, mirroring Julia's open_daf: .daf.zarr/.daf.zarr.zip open a Zarr Daf; .daf.zip opens a ZIP Daf; http(s):// opens a read-only HTTP Daf; .h5df opens an HDF5 Daf; otherwise a native files Daf.

Usage

open_daf(path, mode = "r", name = NULL, packed = FALSE)

Arguments

path

Path (or URL) to the Daf repository

mode

Mode to open the storage ("r", "r+", "w", or "w+"; HTTP is "r" only)

name

Optional name for the Daf object

packed

If TRUE, store arrays chunked and compressed

Value

A Daf object using the backend selected by path

Details

See the Julia documentation for details.

On this page
